title: Statement on Bill to Ensure Traffic Safety and Protect E-Bike Riders
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: AB 530 will require an online written test and a state-issued photo identification for e-bike riders without a valid driver’s license.
AB 530 will prohibit persons under 12 years old from riding e-bikes.
AB 530 aims to establish an e-bike training program and license through a stakeholders working group.
The bill's objective is to prevent youth injuries while riding e-bikes.
AB 530 represents a commitment from communities and the State to enhance e-bike safety.
